supporting_evidence.description: Test suite 'OpenAICompatibleEmbedder' with multiple test cases covering embedding creation and configuration validation scenarios
Test case validating authentication failure handling with 401 status code
Test case validating connection error handling for network failures

semantic_hotspots.purpose: This file contains unit tests for a code parsing service that processes various file types including JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, and Markdown. The tests validate parsing logic for different file formats, content chunking strategies, and handling of edge cases like oversized lines and unsupported file types.

supporting_evidence.description: Test suite for CodeParser class covering various file parsing scenarios
Test for unsupported file extensions returning empty arrays
Tests for JavaScript/TypeScript parsing with query captures

semantic_hotspots.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the QdrantVectorStore client, verifying its integration with the Qdrant vector database for code indexing operations such as initialization, upserting, searching, and deletion. It ensures proper handling of workspace paths, API keys, and search filters.

supporting_evidence.description: describe block with comprehensive test suite for QdrantVectorStore class covering initialization, upsert, search and delete operations
Test case verifying correct initialization of QdrantClient and collectionName in constructor
Test cases for search functionality including directory prefix filtering and payload inclusion

semantic_hotspots.purpose: This is a test suite for the McpHub service that validates Model Context Protocol server connections, configuration handling, and cross-platform compatibility features.
